headline: Top Models & Releases stories this week

stories.title: OpenAI launches Codex Security, an AI agent designed to detect vulnerabilities in software projects
stories.summary: OpenAI's new Codex Security agent automatically hunts for vulnerabilities in code and has already found gaps in OpenSSH and Chromium. The article OpenAI launches Codex Security, an AI agent designed to detect vulnerabilities in software projects appeared first on The Decoder.

stories.title: Conversational LLM Evaluations in Minutes with NVIDIA NeMo Evaluator Agent Skills
Anthropic officially deemed supply chain risk, CEO Amodei announces legal challenge
stories.summary: The Pentagon formally notified Anthropic on March 4 that the company and its products have been designated as a supply chain risk to US national security. The article Anthropic officially deemed supply chain risk, CEO Amodei announces legal challenge appeared first on The Decoder.

stories.title: Softbank seeks record $40 billion loan to fund OpenAI stake
stories.summary: A $40 billion loan for a single bet on OpenAI. Softbank is taking what the AI industry has been doing for a while to its logical extreme: financing the boom on credit. The article Softbank seeks record $40 billion loan to fund OpenAI stake appeared first on The Decoder.
